svg.title: Shuffle test epoch loop
svg.desc: Epoch loop: data preparation, std::shuffle on m_fidx with shared RNG, each worker reads its window, DYAD transparently fetches remote files, process file data omitted, epoch complete, repeat.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does data preparation work in the shuffle test?')
sendPrompt('How does std::shuffle keep all workers in sync without communication?')
sendPrompt('How does each worker know which files to read after shuffling?')
sendPrompt('What happens when open() is called on a file owned by another worker?')
sendPrompt('Why is file data processing omitted in the shuffle test?')
sendPrompt('Why do all workers synchronize at the end of each epoch?')

svg.text: m_gen advances each epoch — different permutation per epoch, all workers identical
